bonuses.stat: Gain Minor Aegis at all times, reducing your damage taken from Dungeon, Trial, and Arena Monsters by 5%.

Grants you and up to 11 other group members Pearlescent Ward. This bonus persists through death.

Pearlescent Ward increases Weapon and Spell Damage by up to 4-180 based on the number of group members that are alive.
Current 4-180 Weapon and Spell Damage.

Pearlescent Ward increases damage reduction from non-player enemies out of 66% based on the number of group members that are dead.
Current 0% damage reduction.
